title: TED Ideas
description: Presentation-style English with clear logic and emphasis.

sentences.english: Every meaningful change begins with a question we are brave enough to ask.
sentences.chinese: 每一次有意义的改变，都始于一个我们足够勇敢去提出的问题。

sentences.english: When we slow down, we often notice details that speed has hidden from us.
sentences.chinese: 当我们慢下来时，常常会注意到被速度掩盖的细节。

sentences.english: Practice is not a performance; it is a place where mistakes can teach us.
sentences.chinese: 练习不是表演；它是一个错误能够教会我们的地方。
